creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Armin,

Could you review the attached patch?  There are a few improvements I would 
like to make.

Changes:
- Trim Makefile header
- Remove indefinite article from COMMENT
- Remove ABI version number from LIB_DEPENDS to satisfy portlint(1)
- Remove unneeded post-patch target
- Convert to new options framework
- Tab -> Space for WWW line in pkg-descr

-- 
Jason E. Hale - jhale@
FreeBSD Ports Committer
KDE/FreeBSD Team
